RULING - The Court required parties to appear. Matter argued by parties. The Court ruled as follows: ATTORNEY JAY T. The Court ordered that Mr. Jambeck provide Mr. Balin with the motion in limine materials, and any Complaint, coversheet, and/or summons regarding Plaintiffs' lawsuit against the Dolan Law Firm by January 20, 2015.
